title: Language Change -  Device is out-of-date
scenario: Language change in Device Settings triggers firmware update prompt and successfully applies language after DFU completion on non-latest firmware headset
steps: 1. Launch Poly Studio Mobile app and ensure a headset is paired and connected.
2. Navigate to Home → [Device Name] → Device Settings.
4. Select a language different from the current one.
6. Tap the "Update now" button on the popup.
7. Allow the firmware update (DFU) process to complete.
8. Observe the app behavior after the update finishes.
expected: After the firmware update completes, the language change is applied successfully on both the app and device. The user is directed to the Home Screen. The headset's firmware is updated to the latest version, and the selected language is properly reflected in the Language section of Device Settings.
